top_signals.title: Video purportedly shows Ukrainian unit running down Russian Shahed. The US is paying attention.
top_signals.summary: An unverified video of Ukrainian unit taking down a Shahed drone with an American-made interceptor comes as the U.S. Army seeks to field drones at scale.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Chinese Teapots Snap Up Middle East Crude As Prices Slide
top_signals.summary: Chinese private refiners are buying Middle Eastern crude on the spot market amid falling prices, Bloomberg reported today, citing two purchases of Saudi and Emirati crude. According to the report, one teapot refiner, Rongsheng Petrochemical Co. bought a cargo of Saudi crude for prompt delivery this month, and another, Shengdong petrochemical Group Co. snapped up an Emirati Upper Zakum crude cargo. A third private refiner from China bought a cargo of Iraqi Basrah crude for delivery next month, unnamed trading sources told the publication. The purchases…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: De la Espriella Says Colombia Will Seek to Refinance Debt
top_signals.summary: Colombian President-elect Abelardo de la Espriella said his incoming administration will seek to refinance the nation’s debt to extend maturities and lower borrowing costs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Ondo Finance debuts SEC-aligned tokenized stock model with BlackRock ETF, Micron shares
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Giro hacia el libre mercado de Cuba no logra convencer a EE.UU.
top_signals.summary: Cuba enfrenta dificultades para convencer al gobierno de Donald Trump de que sus reformas económicas más ambiciosas en décadas son suficientes para impulsar los cambios que exige Estados Unidos. (Source: Bloomberg)
